title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.060 - Contractual and other relations entered while in flight, effect of
text:
305.060.  Contractual and other relations entered while in flight, effect of. — All contractual and other legal relations entered into by aeronauts or passengers while in flight over this state shall have the same effect as if entered into on the land or water beneath.
(RSMo 1939 § 15111) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13910
